title: Jaanwar
desc: A criminal changes the course of his life when he decides to raise a baby who has survived a train crash, but chaos ensues when his past begins to haunt him.

title: Mili
desc: Mili, a young woman, accidentally gets stuck in a walk-in freezer at her workplace. Racing against time, she must find a way to survive.

title: Jersey
desc: A former cricketer in his late 30s returns to the sport to fulfil his son's dream of owning a cricket jersey, battling personal and professional challenges.

title: Janhit Mein Jaari
desc: With the will to break taboo as her armour of choice, Mannu embarks to work as a condom salesperson, despite the reservations of her family and society.

title: Vadh
desc: Burdened by debt and harassed by a loan shark, a retired school teacher's life takes a drastic turn when he acts on his impulses, leading to murder.

title: Blank
desc: A suicide bomber named Hanif loses his memory before he could complete his mission. Resultantly, the Anti-Terrorism Squad must find out his real plan and save the country from a deadly attack.

title: Farrey
desc: Brought up in an orphanage, child prodigy Niyati gets admitted into a prestigious school. Soon, surrounded by money, she gets engulfed in a cheating racket.

title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Bhoot Returns
desc: Tarun and Namrata move into a luxurious bungalow with Taman and Nimmi, their son and daughter respectively. However, strange occurrences start taking place and they must escape in order to survive.

title: Batti Gul Meter Chalu
desc: Interlinked in a love triangle, three childhood friends tumble into a courtroom drama when a printing press owned by one of them receives an inflated electricity bill.

title: Saand Ki Aankh
desc: Two determined women in a conservative village quietly train in sharpshooting and defy expectations with their extraordinary skill and unbreakable resolve.

title: Double Dhamaal
desc: Four idlers make elaborate plans to earn money by investing in buildings but are conned by Kabir, who leaves them unemployed and penniless. Soon, they are on the prowl to avenge their humiliation.

title: Vedaa
desc: Vedaa, a victim of caste discrimination, trains as a boxer under Abhimanyu and strives to seek justice for the murder of her siblings.

title: Kya Kool Hain Hum 3
desc: A man, kicked out of his house, begins to work as an adult film actor in Thailand. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with a girl from a conservative family.
